title: UNDERTALE-style sweep animation
description: This small pack will replace the sweeping attack particle in Minecraft with the "slash" animation from the game UNDERTALE.
body:
This small pack will replace the sweeping attack particle in Minecraft with the "slash" animation from the game UNDERTALE.

The sound for sweeping with a sword is also replaced with the attack sound from UNDERTALE.

This was made by me, after someone suggested that I make it.

_Sound and animation originally by Toby Fox_
